glosses.en: go on a trip; go away on a trip
glosses.ja: 旅行に出かける; 旅行する

translations.en: I want to travel next week.
translations.es: Quiero viajar la semana que viene.
translations.fr: Je veux voyager la semaine prochaine.
translations.ru: Я хочу поехать на следующей неделе.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn đi du lịch vào tuần sau.
translations.nl: Ik wil volgende week op reis.
translations.hi: मैं अगले हफ्ते यात्रा करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να ταξιδέψω την επόμενη εβδομάδα.
translations.da: Jeg vil rejse i næste uge.
translations.ja: 来週旅行に行きたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (finite, present, 1sg) selecting a bare infinitive.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Woche', forming a temporal NP.
Common noun (fem. sg.); head of the temporal NP 'nächste Woche' functioning as an adverbial of time (accusative of time).
Main verb (bare infinitive), intransitive; complement of the modal auxiliary.

sentences.target: Wir können dieses Jahr nicht verreisen.

translations.de: Wir können dieses Jahr nicht verreisen.
translations.fr: Nous ne pouvons pas voyager cette année.
translations.yue: 我哋今年唔可以去旅行。
translations.ru: Мы не можем поехать в этом году.
translations.vi: Năm nay chúng tôi không thể đi du lịch.
translations.nl: We kunnen dit jaar niet op reis.
translations.uk: Ми не можемо подорожувати цього року.
translations.hi: हम इस साल यात्रा नहीं कर सकते.
translations.pl: Nie możemy w tym roku wyjechać.
translations.nb: Vi kan ikke reise i år.
translations.id: Kami tidak bisa bepergian tahun ini.
translations.sv: Vi kan inte resa i år.
translations.da: Vi kan ikke rejse i år.
translations.ja: 今年は旅行に行けません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary (finite, present, 1pl) selecting a bare infinitive.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'Jahr' (neut. sg., accusative in a temporal NP).
Common noun (neut. sg.); head of the temporal NP 'dieses Jahr' functioning as an adverbial of time.
Negation particle; negates the verbal predicate (the infinitive phrase).
Main verb (bare infinitive), intransitive; complement of the modal auxiliary.

translations.en: He has to travel early tomorrow.
translations.fr: Il doit partir tôt demain matin.
translations.ko: 그는 내일 아침 일찍 떠나야 해요.
translations.ru: Ему завтра рано утром нужно уехать.
translations.he: הוא צריך לצאת מוקדם מחר בבוקר.
translations.tr: Yarın sabah erken yola çıkmak zorunda.
translations.vi: Anh ấy phải đi sớm vào sáng mai.
translations.ar: عليه أن يغادر مبكرًا صباح الغد.
translations.hu: Holnap kora reggel el kell utaznia.
translations.hi: उसे कल सुबह जल्दी निकलना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να φύγει νωρίς αύριο το πρωί.
translations.nb: Han må dra tidlig i morgen.
translations.sv: Han måste åka tidigt i morgon bitti.
translations.ro: Trebuie să plece mâine dimineață devreme.
translations.da: Han skal rejse tidligt i morgen.
translations.fi: Hänen täytyy lähteä aikaisin huomenna aamulla.
translations.ja: 彼は明日の朝早く出発しなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary (finite, present, 3sg) expressing obligation; selects a bare infinitive.
Temporal adverb; part of the time expression 'morgen früh'.
Adverb modifying the temporal adverb 'morgen' to specify time of day.
Main verb (bare infinitive), intransitive; complement of the modal auxiliary.

sentences.target: Meine Eltern möchten im Sommer verreisen.

translations.de: Meine Eltern möchten im Sommer verreisen.
translations.en: My parents would like to travel in summer.
translations.es: A mis padres les gustaría viajar en verano.
translations.fr: Mes parents aimeraient voyager cet été.
translations.it: I miei genitori vorrebbero viaggiare in estate.
translations.ko: 우리 부모님은 여름에 여행 가고 싶어 하세요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我父母想在夏天去旅行。
translations.yue: 我爸媽想喺夏天去旅行。
translations.ru: Мои родители хотели бы поехать летом.
translations.pt: Meus pais gostariam de viajar no verão.
translations.he: ההורים שלי היו רוצים לנסוע בקיץ.
translations.vi: Bố mẹ tôi muốn đi du lịch vào mùa hè.
translations.ar: والداي يرغبان في السفر في الصيف.
translations.nl: Mijn ouders willen in de zomer op reis.
translations.uk: Мої батьки хотіли б поїхати влітку.
translations.hi: मेरे माता-पिता गर्मियों में यात्रा करना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Οι γονείς μου θα ήθελαν να ταξιδέψουν το καλοκαίρι.
translations.nb: Foreldrene mine vil gjerne reise i sommer.
translations.id: Orang tua saya ingin bepergian saat musim panas.
translations.sv: Mina föräldrar vill gärna resa i sommar.
translations.ro: Părinții mei ar vrea să călătorească vara.
translations.cs: Moji rodiče by chtěli v létě cestovat.
translations.da: Mine forældre vil gerne rejse til sommer.
translations.ja: 私の両親は夏に旅行に行きたいです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (attributive; 1st person sg.); modifies the plural noun 'Eltern' (nominative).
Common noun (plural); head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II, present, 3pl) expressing polite desire; selects a bare infinitive.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem') governing dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Common noun (masc. sg., dative within the PP); head of the temporal PP 'im Sommer'.
Main verb (bare infinitive), intransitive; complement of the modal auxiliary.
